tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: After skull fracture nearly ended career, Raúl Jiménez scores his first World Cup goal and weeps with joy
stories.summary: Mexico star Raúl Jiménez, 35, broke down in tears scoring his debut World Cup goal nearly six years after a life-threatening head injury threatened to end his playing days forever.

stories.headline: 77-year-old Giants ball boy's diving spirit sparks stunning 9-run comeback victory
stories.summary: Seventy-seven-year-old ball boy "Lefty" diving for a foul ball in the eighth inning sparked the Giants to score 10 runs and win 11-10 from 9-1 down.

stories.headline: Police turn 911 complaint into celebration, rallying firefighters to support lemonade stand with $280
stories.summary: When a neighbor complained about a lemonade stand, a police officer turned it into community magic—firefighters and officers flooded the young entrepreneurs with support and $280.

stories.headline: Two teens on a bike ride discover elderly neighbor stranded for 16+ hours, spark swift rescue
stories.summary: Gunner Skidmore, 13, and best friend Kohen Chick spotted an elderly neighbor lying in her yard after 16+ hours and called 911, saving her life.

stories.headline: Britain's tiniest butterfly rebounds spectacularly, population soars 90-fold from near-extinction
stories.summary: Britain's smallest fritillary butterfly, the Duke of Burgundy, surged from near-extinction to 90 times its previous population in Kent through habitat restoration.

stories.headline: Nineteen companies rally to give struggling woman a brand-new roof
stories.summary: Nineteen companies and volunteers answered Michelle Salter's calls to give Jamie Larison a brand-new roof after years of temporary patches.

stories.headline: Seagrass meadows roar back to life, doubling since last year and saving manatees and turtles
stories.summary: Decades of collaborative restoration work bring seagrass meadows back to a lagoon, doubling in size and restoring vital habitat for manatees and sea turtles.

stories.headline: New Zealand's endangered songbird hits record high—418 breeding pairs prove three decades of care work
stories.summary: New Zealand's kōkako songbird hit a record 418 breeding pairs in the Hunua Ranges, a 61% jump from 2022 after three decades of predator control.

stories.headline: New mobility ramp restores independence and dignity to man living with ALS
stories.summary: Operation Ramp It Up gave Robert Petrey back his independence, allowing him to check his mail and reclaim dignity while living with ALS.

stories.headline: Record leatherback sea turtle hatchling season brings hope to endangered species
stories.summary: Endangered leatherback sea turtles laid a record 42 nests in Palm Beach County—more than double the usual count—signaling hope for a species facing extinction.

stories.headline: German scientists flip the playbook: rewet the peatland, top it with solar panels, earn money two ways
stories.summary: German scientists at the University of Greifswald rewetted peatlands and topped them with solar panels, earning money two ways: electricity above and carbon locked below.

stories.headline: Japanese scientists create battery-free device turning sunlight into usable fuel
stories.summary: Osaka Metropolitan University researchers created an artificial photosynthesis system that converts sunlight into formic acid fuel without needing batteries or electronic controls.
